positive: A minimalist, stylish geometric pattern featuring interconnected constellations and cosmic nebulas. The main subject is a stylized, abstract grouping of celestial bodies forming an intricate, harmonious lattice. Use deep sapphire blues, ethereal lavender, and pops of brilliant gold foil accents. The pattern should be perfectly symmetrical, highly repeatable, and designed as a seamless vector print. Composition should be central, flat, and crisp, suitable for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, clean silhouette style, retro-futuristic aesthetic, ultra-detailed vector illustration, photorealistic ink printing effect.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, grunge, dirty, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, noise, logo, realistic photo, complex scene, depth of field
